---
title: "Workflow"
description: "Reader-facing summary of the governed research workflow."
---

This project uses a governed scholarly workflow: question definition, corpus
approval, lawful source acquisition, textual verification, evidence coding,
claim mapping, adversarial review, and human publication approval.

## Current Phase

The repository is in migration and research-foundation setup. No John Brown
source has yet been marked verified, and no evidence row or thesis-bearing
claim has yet been approved.

## Human Gates

- Corpus approval
- Source-substitution approval for derivative or reported texts
- Codebook approval
- Thesis approval
- Methodology-findings approval
- Publication approval
